creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
mbr         2009-03-25 18:18:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    emulators/open-vm-tools Makefile pkg-plist 
    emulators/open-vm-tools/files vmware-kmod.sh.in 
  Log:
  Unbreak the ports
  Fix PLIST for both with and without X11.
  Fix some configure/build errors with WITH_UNITY option.
  Eliminate use of LIB32DIR because no i386 binary is included in the distfile.
  
  PR:             ports/132999
  Submitted by:   Hiroto Kagotani <hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.23      +12 -15    ports/emulators/open-vm-tools/Makefile
  1.6       +5 -5      ports/emulators/open-vm-tools/files/vmware-kmod.sh.in
  1.17      +35 -35    ports/emulators/open-vm-tools/pkg-plist
